purpose: Help humans and external AI agents run public-safe break-zero checks without sending private data to the website.
privacy_boundary: The user checks official apps or accounts privately. Do not send screenshots, codes, PINs, account IDs, payment details, phone numbers, addresses, identity, KYC, tax, bank, card, wallet, private dashboard text, or recovery information.

capital_gate.rule: No spend by default. Cost is considered only when expected value is greater than total cost, maximum loss is known, official source is verified, eligibility is real, no gambling or speculation exists, no deposit/new-funds bonus is involved, no sensitive data is handled by agents, and a stop point is defined.

official_sources.label: Google Opinion Rewards Help - Earn rewards

cards.value_form: Google Play or PayPal credit depending on app, account, platform, and region.
ai_role: classify any user-returned summary without asking for private proof
human_private_action: check whether an existing survey, reward, or payable credit is visible
report only the public-safe return format
cards.evidence_gate: Value counts only when Play credit, PayPal credit, or another official usable reward is visible and usable in the user's own official account.

cards.value_form: Points redeemable for gift cards, account rewards, or other official rewards where available.
ai_role: prepare a no-private-data points-check script for the human
classify whether the public-safe summary is a rung hit
human_private_action: open the official Microsoft Rewards dashboard privately
check whether existing points are enough for a usable reward
report only the public-safe return format
cards.evidence_gate: Value counts only when an official Microsoft reward is issued and usable by the account owner.

cards.route: Existing reward, prepaid, gift, platform, or payout balances
cards.value_form: Already issued card, wallet, reward, payout, or store balance from official providers such as PayPal, Amazon, Apple, Google Play, Microsoft, Steam, Tremendous, Tango, or Hyperwallet.
ai_role: help classify user-returned public-safe amount band
route verified usable value to the evidence gate without storing private details
human_private_action: open the official provider account privately
check whether a usable balance, card, reward, or code already exists
report only the public-safe return format
cards.evidence_gate: Value counts only when an existing official balance, reward, gift card, code, payout, or credit is usable by the account owner.
